caption: Nyay Devi, goddess of justice, depicted in Indian attire at the judges' library of the Supreme Court of India. Depicted as a decolonised version of Lady Justice, where the blindfolds and the sword are replaced with the book of the constitution, implying the justice system of India is more informed and focused on justice and not punishing.
